summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 197 features: backend flat_only/skip/search params, admin Soul Products gallery (pagination+search), admin Breed Cakes Flat Art tab, admin CloudinaryUploader in edit modal, user-facing Soul Made category tabs (Dine/Go/Play), Yappy Art section, SoulMadeModal 700px width, Celebrate page skeleton shimmer. Fixed PlayContentModal duplicate 'all' tab bug.

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate 'all' tab in soul_made category - setTabs() included 'all' but rendering prepended it again via ['all', ...tabs].map(). FIXED in this iteration by changing setTabs to not include 'all' for soul_made.

issues: Duplicate key error: 'Encountered two children with the same key, go' - some component has non-unique keys. Non-critical but should be investigated.

action_items: Investigate and fix 'Encountered two children with the same key' React warning (key='go') visible in console - appears on multiple page navigations
PlayContentModal duplicate 'all' tab was FIXED - no further action needed
critical_code_review_comments: PlayContentModal line 240 had duplicate 'all' in setTabs for soul_made: setTabs(['all', ...subCats]) AND rendering prepended 'all' via ['all', ...tabs]. Fixed to setTabs(subCats). Confirm the fix resolves the duplicate.

DineContentModal: flatArtProducts loaded from separate API call (flat_only=true) - Yappy Art section correctly renders BELOW watercolour products after ~5-6 second wait. Note: timing sensitive - appears only after full API response.
SoulMadeModal confirmed at maxWidth:700px (was 520px before this iteration) - confirmed via DOM computed style.
Celebrate shimmer skeleton uses inline CSS animation 'celebrate-shimmer' (not Tailwind class) - properly shows 4 shimmer cards during loading, disappears when data loads.
test_credentials: User: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123, Admin: aditya / lola4304
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 197 tested: (1) Backend breed-products API with flat_only, skip, search params - all working. (2) Admin Soul Products - Generated Mockups tab has search+pagination. (3) Admin Breed Cakes - has Flat Art (831) tab. (4) Admin edit modal has CloudinaryUploader. (5) Dine/Go/Play Soul Made category: No duplicate All tab (fixed Play). (6) Yappy Art section renders below watercolour products in DineContentModal (needs 5-6s for data load). (7) SoulMadeModal width confirmed 700px. (8) Celebrate shimmer skeleton renders during loading with 'celebrate-shimmer' CSS animation. Key file modified: /app/frontend/src/components/play/PlayContentModal.jsx (line 240 fix for duplicate 'all' tab).

verified_features.1_backend_flat_only: PASS - /api/mockups/breed-products?flat_only=true returns flat_ products with total count. 35 products for Indie. 831 total across all breeds.
verified_features.2_backend_pagination_skip: PASS - skip param works, skip=0 vs skip=5 returns different products, consistent total regardless of skip value
verified_features.3_backend_search: PASS - search=labrador filters correctly, case-insensitive, nonexistent returns empty
verified_features.4_admin_gallery_search_pagination: PASS - Soul Products > AI Mockups tab shows Generated Mockups gallery with search bar and pagination controls
verified_features.5_admin_breed_cakes_flat_art_tab: PASS - Breed Cakes admin has 'Flat Art (831)' tab showing flat art products
verified_features.6_admin_cloudinary_uploader: PASS - Edit breed product modal has CloudinaryUploader (not just text URL field)
verified_features.7_no_duplicate_all_tab: PASS (Dine/Go/Play/Celebrate) - Dine: single 'All', Go: single 'All', Play: FIXED (was duplicate, now single 'all'), Celebrate: no tabs for soul_made
verified_features.8_yappy_art_section: PASS - Yappy Art section renders below watercolour products in DineContentModal after full data load (need ~5-6 second wait)
verified_features.10_celebrate_skeleton_shimmer: PASS - celebrate-shimmer animation present in HTML at page load, disappears after data loads
